author: w3Lb
content: Delivered in commit f2b5506: #116 entry moved from [0.3.1] to [Unreleased], with the affected-scope statement added (published 0.3.0/0.3.1, Windows only, >=stream_min_bytes files without undo entries; failed runs leave originals untouched, exit 2). Release notes now match what actually shipped. Doc-only.
